title: rosa × dumetorum subsp. leptotricha
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subsp. leptotricha, also known as the wild rose or Rosa rugosa, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subsp. leptotricha include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
